creator: pkubaj@FreeBSD.org
text:
Support for powerp64le architecture has been recently added and there are first ISO images available at https://download.freebsd.org/ftp/snapshots/powerpc/powerpc64le/

However, powerpc64le is still not listed at https://www.freebsd.org/where.html in "FreeBSD 13.0-CURRENT" section.
